extDescription.message: Download emojis and stickers from Douyin web chat. Supports context menu and batch ZIP download.

scanErrorHint1.message: You are on Douyin web chat (douyin.com)

scanErrorHint3.message: If the issue persists, try refreshing the page

noEmojisFound.message: No emojis found on this page

noEmojisHint.message: Make sure a chat dialog is open, then try refreshing the page

rightClickHint.message: Right-click any image on Douyin and select "Download This Emoji" for quick download
